params.name: typer.Option(..., "--url", "-u", help="Url to keys, for example https://vault.site.com:8200/v1/kv/keys1")
typer.Option(..., "--token", "-t", prompt=True, hide_input=True, prompt_required=False, help="A vault token")
typer.Option(..., "--file", "-f", help="Path to a file with private keys")
typer.Option("--hex2dec", "-d", help="Print result in decimal value")
